name: Fragrance Group Limited
summary: Fragrance Group Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a property developer in Singapore, Australia, and the United Kingdom. The company operates through Property Development, Commercial Investment, Hotel Operations, and Hospitality Investment segments. The Property Development segment develops and sells residential and commercial properties. The Commercial Investment segment is involved in the investment and rental of properties. The Hotel Operations segment manages hotels. The Hospitality Investment segment leases hotels to operators. The company also develops, deals, and trades in properties. Fragrance Group Limited was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Singapore.
